case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. TERRI L. NEWMMAN et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-10-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-10-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TERRI NEWMAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER OF TERRI L. NEWMMAN FILED ON 2/10/10 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
